description: Baseline runtime coverage before adding tests

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline for saorsa-gossip-runtime line coverage with tests-only target >90%.

description: Add focused rendezvous unit tests for cache, shard, publish, payload, expiry, collector paths

description: Baseline coverage for runtime crate: 43.44% (275/633 lines)

Added 43 new tests across coordinator.rs (16), rendezvous.rs (17), runtime.rs (10), and fixed context.rs getter test. Coverage jumped from 43.44% to 92.95%. Used mock implementations of GossipTransport, Membership, and PubSub traits.

hypothesis.strategy: mock-based unit tests for CoordinatorClient and RendezvousClient

description: Final verification: 93.01% coverage (1238/1331 lines), all 54 tests pass. Above 90% target.
Added 5 more tests: peer_health_oracle builder + build (runtime.rs), FOAF with valid CBOR responses, bad CBOR response, and wrong stream type (coordinator.rs). Coverage up from 93.01% to 95.26%.

hypothesis.strategy: cover remaining production gaps: peer_health_oracle path and collect_coordinator_responses inner loop
